FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class RichTextBlock

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

WinUI RichTextBlock equivalent: read-only, multi-paragraph rich text laid out as a vertical column of paragraphs. Each paragraph is a SpanTextEl — an array of typed inline runs (the WinUI Run/Bold/Hyperlink inline model, RichTextBlock.g.h:63 get_Blocks) that shapes as ONE wrapped flow (rtb-01).

Selection (rtb-02): ON by default — IsTextSelectionEnabled=TRUE by default on CRichTextBlock (RichTextBlock.cpp:1730); mouse drag selects (word on double-click, all on triple), Ctrl+C copies through the clipboard seam (TextSelectionManager.cpp:30-41), the highlight reuses the editor's selection brushes (TextControlSelectionHighlightColor ≡ the system accent, TextSelectionManager.cpp:52-56) and the I-beam shows while selectable. SelectionHighlightColor overrides the brush per control (api-04 — TextBlock.cpp:266/330 SelectionHighlightColor). Honest scope: selection is PER PARAGRAPH (the drag clamps to the paragraph it anchored in); WinUI's cross-paragraph selection arrives with the block-collection pass.

Hyperlinks: Hyperlink(string, Action) spans get the WinUI inline-Hyperlink treatment — accent foreground (HyperlinkForeground = AccentTextFillColorPrimary, generic.xaml:1120-1122), underline, the Hand cursor over the span's laid rects and OnClick on release (SetCursor(MouseCursorHand), RichTextBlock.cpp:2995).

public static class RichTextBlock

Article(string, IReadOnlyList<string>)

A titled rich-text block: a bold 20px heading followed by the body paragraphs (source-compatible).

public static BoxEl Article(string heading, IReadOnlyList<string> paragraphs)

BoxEl

Bold(string)

A SemiBold run — the WinUI Bold inline maps onto the type ramp's strong weight (BaseTextBlockStyle FontWeight=SemiBold, TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:13).

public static TextSpan Bold(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

TextSpan

Create(IReadOnlyList<TextSpan[]>)

A column of RICH paragraphs — each an array of inline runs (mixed weights/colors/hyperlinks) that wraps as one flow (rtb-01).

public static BoxEl Create(IReadOnlyList<TextSpan[]> paragraphs)

Parameters

paragraphs IReadOnlyList<TextSpan[]>

Returns

BoxEl

Parameters

paragraphs IReadOnlyList<TextSpan[]>
options RichTextBlock.Options

Returns

BoxEl

Create(IReadOnlyList<string>)

A column of body paragraphs (14px, primary text), 10px between paragraphs, capped at 560px wide. Source-compatible with the pre-inline-model API; each paragraph is now a selectable single-run SpanTextEl (RichTextBlock selection default-on, RichTextBlock.cpp:1730).

public static BoxEl Create(IReadOnlyList<string> paragraphs)

Parameters

paragraphs IReadOnlyList<string>

Returns

BoxEl

Create(IReadOnlyList<string>, in Options) 

public static BoxEl Create(IReadOnlyList<string> paragraphs, in RichTextBlock.Options options)

Parameters

paragraphs IReadOnlyList<string>
options RichTextBlock.Options

Returns

BoxEl

Hyperlink(string, Action)

An inline hyperlink (WinUI Hyperlink): accent foreground (HyperlinkForeground = AccentTextFillColorPrimary, generic.xaml:1120-1122) + underline + the engine Hand cursor over the span's laid rects, firing onClick on click (RichTextBlock.cpp:2995-3001). No italic variant: the shaper has no style axis yet (faces resolve by family+weight).

public static TextSpan Hyperlink(string text, Action onClick)

Parameters

text string
onClick Action

Returns

TextSpan

Paragraph(TextSpan[], bool, ColorF)

One rich paragraph from inline runs — body type (14px primary, wrapping), selection per isTextSelectionEnabled (the control default is on; see RichTextBlock.Options).

public static SpanTextEl Paragraph(TextSpan[] spans, bool isTextSelectionEnabled = true, ColorF selectionHighlightColor = default)

Parameters

spans TextSpan[]
isTextSelectionEnabled bool
selectionHighlightColor ColorF

Returns

SpanTextEl

Run(string)

A plain run inheriting the paragraph style (WinUI Run).

public static TextSpan Run(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

TextSpan
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
